yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Firefox_149_Released_With_Patch_for_37_V {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Firefox 149 Released With Patch for 37 Vulnerabilities that Enables Remote Attac"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-25"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-UNKNOWN" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_F5_NGINX_Plus_and_Open_Source_Vulnerabil {

        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"

        any of them
}

        date = "2026-03-25"

}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 109 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 48 as HIGH risk. 23 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, UNC-UNKNOWN. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.

Deploy auto-generated Sigma/YARA detection rules to SIEM/EDR
